23:11 â June 7, 2023
Updates to Currency Ordering
We revised the Currency Ordering Part as described in the table below.
Currency Volume
Currency Ordering Part
Section 6.3, Creating User Profiles in Cash Services
We added procedures for using the Locations Filter when creating a user.
Section 6.9, Adding or Removing Access to Locations
We updated the procedures to include filtering instructions when adding or removing locations for an existing user.
Section 11.1, Ordering Supplies for Returning Currency
We added a note to clarify that you can order penny bags from Brinks or your cash shipment provider. Westkey Graphics doesnât provide penny bags.
Section 11.4, Returning Canadian Coin
We clarified that loose and rolled coin can be deposited with loose CAD notes and included on the same deposit slip. Pennies must be loose in a separate bag from other coins, and each penny bag should contain $25 for shipment.
